mbrInfo.formula: "OCF_Opening Balance"+("OCF_Operating Cash Inflow"+"OCF_Financing Cash Inflows"+"OCF_Investing Cash Inflows")-("OCF_Operating Cash Outflow"+"OCF_Financing Cash Outflows"+"OCF_Investing Cash Outflows"+"OCF_Cash Outflows for Fixed Assets");
IF ("OCF_Cash Buffer" == #Missing) "OCF_Cash Over Buffer" = #Missing; Else "OCF_Closing Balance" - "OCF_Cash Buffer"; EndIf;
IF (@ISMBR("OEP_Forecast") AND @ISMBR("OCF_Total Forecasted Cash")) "OCF_Total Cash"->"OEP_Actual"->"OCF_Smart Drivers"; ENDIF;
("OCF_Operating Cash Inflow"+"OCF_Investing Cash Inflows"+"OCF_Financing Cash Inflows") ;
-(("OCF_Operating Cash Outflow"+"OCF_Investing Cash Outflows"+"OCF_Financing Cash Outflows"));
